# Regex fixtures for skill: brainstorming
# Format: one directive per non-empty, non-comment line.
#   MATCH: <prompt>     — regex from config/default-triggers.json for this skill must match
#   NO_MATCH: <prompt>  — regex must NOT match
# Tested deterministically by tests/test-regex-fixtures.sh (zero LLM cost).
# NO_MATCH lines pin the word-boundary guards on the build-verb alternation
# (embedded reNEWed, BUILDing, STARTing must not fire), plus one generic
# debugging contrast.

MATCH: lets brainstorm the caching layer
MATCH: design the retry strategy for the worker
MATCH: build a webhook receiver for stripe events
MATCH: how should we structure the config
MATCH: add rate limiting to the api
MATCH: set up the project scaffolding
MATCH: setup a webhook receiver

NO_MATCH: debug the failing login test
NO_MATCH: renewed the tls certificate on the gateway
NO_MATCH: the building permit example in the docs is outdated
NO_MATCH: starting the server takes 30 seconds
NO_MATCH: fix the asset upload bug
NO_MATCH: the offset update logic is wrong
